meaning: n.蝙蝠,球棒v.用球棒击球 [计] 批处理文件的扩展名 [军] Basic Armor Training,装甲兵基础训练
examples: I bolted the door the instant I saw the bat.
In Chinese folklore the bat is a symbol of good fortune.
If you are a batboy, then you are holding the bat for the baseball players.
Austin commemorates the peak viewing season with Bat Fest, now in its seventh year.
Specially-licensed staff have been sexing, weighing and measuring bats in Kielder's 232 bat boxes.
